title: Webhooks in Workflows
excerpt: Love the new Workflows feature, but adding the ability to add webhooks into workflow would be immensely helpful! Other integrations would be appreciated too.

posts.author: michaelabi (Michael Bernstein)
posts.cookedHtml: Love the new Workflows feature, but adding the ability to add webhooks into workflow would be immensely helpful! Other integrations would be appreciated too.

posts.author: MCautreels (Maarten Cautreels - Tryve)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Michael,

We love the new workflow feature as well! That’s why we’ve created our app Workflow Extensions.

The feature you are describing, however, is not available yet but I’m super curious to learn more. I’ll send you a DM to have the ability to better understand your needs and perhaps build the requested feature into the Workflow builder for you!

Best,

Maarten

posts.author: sachinkarma (sachin kumar karma)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @michaelabi

Totally agree—adding webhooks to Workflows would be a game-changer! This would open up so many possibilities for seamless third-party integrations, custom automations, and real-time data sync with external apps.

In the meantime, a possible workaround is using Make.com to bridge the gap:

Trigger a workflow event in your platform.
Use Make.com to listen for changes via API or polling.
Send data to your desired app via webhooks

Would love to see this feature natively integrated though! Hopefully, it gets on the roadmap soon.

Let’s Schedule the call
